The SmartThings REST API provides programmatic access to the SmartThings platform for controlling connected devices, creating automations, managing locations, rooms, scenes, and building smart home integrations. Supports OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens and personal access tokens. Base URL: https://api.smartthings.com/v1.
